## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated positive and negative tests
- [ ] Ran `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] Ran `cargo test --locked --offline`
- [ ] Ran the relevant integration or release gate
- [ ] Updated documentation and checklists
- [ ] Confirmed generated artifacts and dependencies are not committed
